SEARCH
Package com.example.edgers_lottery

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.example.edgers_lottery.User
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class User extends Object implements Serializable
Model class representing a user account in the Edgers Lottery system. Supports three roles: ENTRANT, ORGANIZER, and ADMIN. Implements Serializable to allow passing instances between activities.
See Also:

    Enum representing the possible roles a user can hold.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User()
      Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • User

      public User(String id, String name, String email, String role)
      Constructs a new User with the required core fields.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique Firestore document ID
      name - the full name of the user
      email - the email address of the user
      role - the role assigned to the user

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      the user's full name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - the full name to set

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns:
      the user's email address

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Parameters:
      email - the email address to set

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Returns:
      the user's phone number, or an empty string if not set

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Parameters:
      phone - the phone number to set, or null to store an empty string

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns:
      the user's description, or an empty string if not set

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Parameters:
      description - the description to set

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Returns:
      the user's location, or an empty string if not set

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Parameters:
      location - the location to set

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Returns:
      the user's display username, or "no username" if not set

    • setUsername

      public void setUsername(String username)
      Parameters:
      username - the display username to set

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      the user's Firestore document ID

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Parameters:
      id - the Firestore document ID to set

    • getRole

      public String getRole()
      Returns:
      the user's role as a string, e.g. "ENTRANT", "ORGANIZER", or "ADMIN"

    • setRole

      public void setRole(String role)
      Parameters:
      role - the role to set
